projects

resume

github

Oriyon

NO. 007 | Python | Typescript | FastAPI | AWS | Docker | Redis

Text to CAD

AI chatbot powered by a random forest regression model that predicts aerodynamic performance with an MAE of 0.06. Reduced parametric CAD model generation time by >93% by using CadQuery to automate geometry creation and STL meshing, facilitating instant part downloads

Links

Website (try now!): https://oriyon.tech

April 2025

Nicholas Yeung

Map Reduce

NO. 006 | Docker | Go | Python | Typescript

Large Scale Data Processing

Reimplementation of MapReduce based on the google research paper. Distributed system with a Boss (Go), and worker nodes (Python). Features a web dashboard for submitting jobs and viewing utilization/progress. Demos include counting large (10GB) csv files and a 2-job "chained" ridge regression.

Links

Github repo: https://github.com/parallax9999/MapReduce

December 2024

Nicholas Yeung

Piazza Bot

NO. 005 | Cassandra | Redis | Kafka | Docker | RAG | Go | Python

Answering Piazza Posts

Distributed system with Kaltury Gallery scrapers, local models (embedding & llm), and RAG pipeline. Answers Piazza posts with citations and timestamps directly from lecture transcripts. Supports user defined parsers for each class.

Links

Github repo: https://github.com/njyeung/piazza-bot | Writeup: Piazza_Bot.pdf

December 2025

Nicholas Yeung

3Docs

NO. 004 | Next.js | Python | Fish Audio | Gemini | GCR | Sqlite | Tripo AI

Generate Interactive 3D Repair Guides

3Docs is a platform that transforms boring old PDF manuals into interactive 3D manuals complete with voice guidance and PDF references for each step of a process.

1st Place @ Madhacks 2025!

Devpost: https://devpost.com/software/3docs | Github repo: https://github.com/r-thak/3Docs-MadHacks2025-Winner

November 2025

Nicholas Yeung

Perp

NO. 003 | Typescript | Slack | Zoom | Notion

Never Miss A Meeting

Perp is a meeting bot that everyone can chat with during a meeting to stay on the same page the entire time. To fully integrated into workflows, it simply works with existing tools like Notion, Slack, Zoom, Google Meets, and Microsoft Outlook.

Y Combinator Agent Jam 25 Winner!

Hackathon submission: Video Demo

November 2025

Nicholas Yeung

HoppyShare

NO. 002 | MQTT | Next.js | Docker | Go | Supabase | Python | AWS | Kotlin

One Clipboard, All Your Devices.

Syncs your clipboard across ALL your devices, whether you're connected to the internet or not. Windows, MacOS, Linux, and Android supported. Powered by MQTT and BLE, with a cute mascot that sits in your systray.

Links

Website (try now!): https://www.hoppyshare.com/ | Github repo: https://github.com/njyeung/hoppyshare

July 2025

Nicholas Yeung

Reels

NO. 001 | Go | FFmpeg | Kitty Graphics | npm | Homebrew

Instagram Reels in the Terminal

TUI app to watch, like, and browse comments on Instagram Reels directly from the command line. Uses Kitty graphics protocol for inline video. Available on npm, Homebrew, and AUR.

Links

Github repo: https://github.com/njyeung/reels | npm package: https://npmjs.com/package/@reels/tui

March 2026

Nicholas Yeung
